# Test User — Experience Corpus

## Acme Corp (Senior Engineer)
**Dates:** 2023 - Present
**Tech stack:** Python, PostgreSQL, AWS

### Built data pipeline
Built a scalable data pipeline processing 1M+ records daily
using Apache Airflow. Reduced overnight batch time from 4
hours to 45 minutes through parallel execution and partitioning.

### Migrated to microservices
Led migration of monolithic billing service into 4 microservices
over 6 months. Coordinated with 3 product teams and zero
customer-facing incidents during cutover.

order processing at 10k events per second.
